description:
Product information:

Included Components：DVD
Full HD 1080P Night Vision and Sony IMX307： 1S Smart Panel Camera allows you to reach Full HD 1080P resolution, recording every detail on the road for you. Equipped with Sony IMX307 image processor and F/2.2 aperture, the dash camera is pulled in more light to brighten low light scenes, provide clear images even in low light
Built-in G-Sensor & Emergency Recording： Equipped with built-in G-Sensor, 70mai smart dash cam 1S can automatically record an emergency situation and save the videos. All emergency videos are securely locked as 'Event File' to prevent an overwrite
Voice Control Dash Cam：To provide a safe and hands-free using experience, you can use voice commands to use your camera. This car camera recorder can let you control it easily to take pictures and record videos with just your voice
Loop Recording & Evidence Protection： Dashboard camera automatically replaces the oldest videos with the newest ones. Videos can be automatically saved and stored locally to a microSD memory card while driving, which ensures that video evidence is captured and securely protected from overwriting. Supports high-strength Class 10 (and higher) microSD memory cards from 16GB to 128GB (not included)
Built-in WiFi and APP Control：With built-in WiFi, it can connect to 70mai APP, which simply allows you to watch real-time images, play recorded videos and download files to your phone. Also, this function allowed you to get continuous OTA updates by automatically fixing bugs and updating software


Packing list:

Driving recorder*1

variants.name: 70mai Smart Dash Cam 1S 1080P HD Powerful Night Vision Black
